nodes.name: constructrandomwalkmetropoliskernel
nodes.description: Builds a pure Random-Walk Metropolis-Hastings transition kernel from a target log-density oracle, with explicit immutable state and random number generator (RNG) threading.
nodes.type_signature: (target_log_kernel: log-density oracle) -> random-walk Metropolis transition kernel
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
